title: Language Change - Disconnecting/Connecting earbuds to check DFU pop up
scenario: Language update fails with persistent pop-up when one earbud is disconnected on Voyager Free 60+
steps: 1. Open Poly Studio Mobile app on the Android device.
5. While the update is in progress, place one earbud (either right or left) into the charge case so it disconnects.
6. Observe the pop-up that appears on the screen.
7. Reconnect the disconnected earbud by removing it from the charge case.
8. Observe whether the pop-up dismisses automatically.
10. Observe the screen you are returned to.
expected: After reconnecting the earbud, the pop-up should dismiss automatically, or the language update should resume without requiring user intervention.
